hooks.command: JQ="/c/Users/kaiog/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Packages/jqlang.jq_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe/jq.exe"; FILE=$("$JQ" -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'futebol-ao-vivo'; then cd "C:/Users/kaiog/Downloads/Projeto claude code/futebol-ao-vivo" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "auto: update $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" && git push); fi 2>/dev/null || true
